Author.quote: merge it and confirm to the author (send `MergeDone`).
Author.note: dual of Merger's explicit send; Author's own text ('You are done when your change has been merged') corroborates but does not itself name the message.

Merger.quote: merge it and confirm to the author (send `MergeDone`).

CodeReviewer.reason: 'pass it on with your verdict (send `ReviewPassed`)' names no recipient role.

SecurityReviewer.reason: 'report it as cleared (send `SecurityPassed`)' names no recipient role.
